example.title: Valid decision record
example.code: { "decision_id": "vendor-pick-2026q2", "options": [ {"id": "do-nothing", "name": "Status quo", "is_baseline": true}, {"id": "vendor-a", "name": "Vendor A"}, {"id": "vendor-b", "name": "Vendor B"} ], "criteria": [ {"id": "tco", "name": "Total cost of ownership", "weight": 0.4}, {"id": "fit", "name": "Functional fit", "weight": 0.3}, {"id": "risk", "name": "Vendor risk", "weight": 0.3} ], "weights_locked_at": "2026-05-23T08:00:00Z", "scores": [ {"option_id": "do-nothing", "criterion_id": "tco", "score": 3, "evidence": "current-spend.csv#row=4"}, {"option_id": "vendor-a", "criterion_id": "tco", "score": 4, "evidence": "vendor-a-tco.pdf#page=12"}, {"option_id": "vendor-b", "criterion_id": "tco", "score": 3, "evidence": "vendor-b-tco.pdf#page=9"}, {"option_id": "do-nothing", "criterion_id": "fit", "score": 2, "evidence": "internal-rfc.md#L40"}, {"option_id": "vendor-a", "criterion_id": "fit", "score": 4, "evidence": "vendor-a-demo.mp4#12:30"}, {"option_id": "vendor-b", "criterion_id": "fit", "score": 3, "evidence": "vendor-b-demo.mp4#08:15"}, {"option_id": "do-nothing", "criterion_id": "risk", "score": 5, "evidence": "internal-baseline.md"}, {"option_id": "vendor-a", "criterion_id": "risk", "score": 3, "evidence": "vendor-a-soc2.pdf"}, {"option_id": "vendor-b", "criterion_id": "risk", "score": 4, "evidence": "vendor-b-soc2.pdf"} ], "sensitivity": {"monte_carlo_runs": 5000, "weight_jitter_pct": 20, "rank_flip_rate": 0.07, "unstable_pairs": []}, "approver": {"name": "Pedro Silva", "role": "CFO", "signoff_ts": "2026-05-23T11:00:00Z"}, "rationale": "Vendor A wins on TCO and fit despite higher risk; sensitivity flip rate 7% below 15% threshold." }
example.note: "do nothing" included; evidence per cell; weights locked; sensitivity below threshold; approver signed.

example.title: Invalid — missing do-nothing baseline
example.note: No baseline option; under-min criteria; empty scores.

list.item: options[] without any is_baseline=true entry (rule r3)
sensitivity rank_flip_rate > 0.15 without flagged unstable_pairs (rule r4)
approver block missing or unsigned (rule r5)
Re-run Monte Carlo with higher run count if rank_flip_rate is near threshold.
